description_long: This is a large, classical-style vase with a wide, rounded body and a narrow neck, featuring two prominent, curved handles on either side. The upper portion of the vase is adorned with a pale tan color and intricate relief patterns, including a central motif of a tree and animal, possibly inspired by ancient Greek or Roman pottery. The lower section of the vase is painted a vibrant green, separated from the upper body by a distinct black line, and the base is a light blue, circular platform. The back and sides of the vase display a deep red color, with the red area bordered by irregular, organic lines, giving the appearance of a partially painted or weathered surface. Small red dots are scattered across the tan area, adding a decorative accent. The overall form is elegant and symmetrical, making it suitable as a decorative object in public or semi-public urban spaces.
description: A large, classical vase with tan, red, green, and blue sections, ornate handles, and decorative relief motifs. The vase features a mix of painted and sculpted details, giving it an elegant, historic appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the tan upper body with relief motifs, two handles, green lower section, and blue base.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the transition from tan to deep red, with the handle and decorative black border visible.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the deep red painted area, both handles, and the green and blue base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the irregular red-tan border, handle, and decorative motifs partially visible.
attribute_pattern: figurative relief with scattered dots and color blocking
